likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the main ticket window.

responses.english: Ask at the main ticket window.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Initiation Well is
phrases.text_local: Podes dizer-me onde fica o Poço Iniciático?
phrases.pronunciation: POH-dihsh dee-ZEHR-MIH OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AW POH-soo ee-nee-SEEAH-tee-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The well is accessed through a spiral staircase descending into the earth.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia oficial ou na bilheteira.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the official guide or at the ticket office.

responses.english: Ask the official guide or at the ticket office.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL OHW NUH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia oficial ou na bilheteira.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Guardian Grotto is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Gruta do Guardião?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH GROO-tuh DOO gwuh-ruh-DEEOWN?
phrases.cultural_note: The grotto features a carved stone figure watching over the underground passage.

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao guia oficial ou ao vigia.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL OHW OW vee-ZHEEUH.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the official guide or the security guard.

responses.english: Ask the official guide or the security guard.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL OHW OW vee-ZHEEUH.
responses.french: Pergunte ao guia oficial ou ao vigia.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a saída do Jardim Labirinto?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SUHEE-duh DOO zhuh-ruh-DEEN luh-bee-REEN-too?

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para o Jardim Labirinto. A saída está sinalizada no percurso.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN luh-bee-REEN-too. AH SUHEE-duh ehs-TAH see-nuh-lee-ZAH-duh NOO peh-ruh-KOO-ruh-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Jardim Labirinto. The exit is marked along the path.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Jardim Labirinto. The exit is marked along the path.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW zhuh-ruh-DEEN luh-bee-REEN-too. AH SUHEE-duh ehs-TAH see-nuh-lee-ZAH-duh NOO peh-ruh-KOO-ruh-soo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para o Jardim Labirinto. A saída está sinalizada no percurso.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Poço Iniciático entrance is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a entrada do Poço Iniciático?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH ayngt-RAH-duh DOO POH-soo ee-nee-SEEAH-tee-koo?
phrases.cultural_note: The Poço Iniciático is a popular symbolic well; follow garden signs to find it.

likely_response.local: Siga a sinalização para o Poço Iniciático.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN PUH-ruh AW POH-soo ee-nee-SEEAH-tee-koo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the Initiation Well.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the Initiation Well.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh AH see-nuh-lee-zuh-SOWN PUH-ruh AW POH-soo ee-nee-SEEAH-tee-koo.
responses.french: Siga a sinalização para o Poço Iniciático.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Initiation Well is
phrases.cultural_note: The Initiation Well is a famous inverted tower used for ceremonial purposes, not a water source.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, o Poço Iniciático fica nos jardins.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, AW POH-soo ee-nee-SEEAH-tee-koo FEE-kuh NOOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, the Initiation Well is in the gardens.

responses.english: Good morning, the Initiation Well is in the gardens.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, AW POH-soo ee-nee-SEEAH-tee-koo FEE-kuh NOOSH zhuh-ruh-DEENSH.
responses.french: Bom dia, o Poço Iniciático fica nos jardins.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Holy Trinity Chapel is
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a Capela da Santíssima Trindade?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH kuh-PEH-luh DUH sahnng-TEE-see-muh treen-DAH-dih?
phrases.cultural_note: The chapel is tucked within the palace grounds with three distinct windows.

likely_response.local: A Capela da Santíssima Trindade é um dos pontos do percurso. Consulte um guia oficial para indicações precisas.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH kuh-PEH-luh DUH sahnng-TEE-see-muh treen-DAH-dih EH OONNG DOOSH POHNG-toosh DOO peh-ruh-KOO-ruh-soo. koong-SOOW-tih OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL PUH-ruh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH prih-SEE-zuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: The Holy Trinity Chapel is one of the points on the route. Consult an official guide for precise directions.

responses.english: The Holy Trinity Chapel is one of the points on the route. Consult an official guide for precise directions.
responses.phonetic: AH kuh-PEH-luh DUH sahnng-TEE-see-muh treen-DAH-dih EH OONNG DOOSH POHNG-toosh DOO peh-ruh-KOO-ruh-soo. koong-SOOW-tih OONNG GEEUH aw-fee-SEEAHL PUH-ruh een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH prih-SEE-zuhsh.
responses.french: A Capela da Santíssima Trindade é um dos pontos do percurso. Consulte um guia oficial para indicações precisas.
